label: Stage fail trigger (target not lit)
description: Fails the stage when the ritual target is not illuminated.

allowanceTicks.label: Allowance ticks
allowanceTicks.description: Number of ticks the condition is allowed to persist before the stage fails.

onlyIfTargetIsOfDef.label: Only if target is of def
onlyIfTargetIsOfDef.description: If set, this trigger only activates when the ritual target is of this ThingDef.
